description: I am presenting at the MIT Programming Languages Review Workshop for our work, "Prompts Are Programs Too! Understanding How Developers Build Software Containing Prompts".
Our paper, "TableTalk: Scaffolding Spreadsheet Development with a Language Agent" was accepted to ACM TOCHI.
Our paper, "Prompts Are Programs Too! Understanding How Developers Build Software Containing Prompts" was accepted to ACM FSE 2025. See you in Trondheim, Norway! 🇳🇴
